steps.title: Use the collaboration contrast
steps.content: The passage contrasts awards to a single person with success achieved through collaboration. The blank describes individuals who work alone, because recognition is not restricted to that kind of individual.

steps.title: Reject imprecise words
steps.content: A means organized together, the opposite of working alone. B means accidental and does not fit people in this context. D describes kindness or thoughtfulness, not individual work style.

steps.title: Name the lone worker
steps.content: Solitary means alone, matching the contrast with collaborative scientific work. The answer is C.
